Every day, choose one topic from the keyword group below and create an English LinkedIn post with one supporting reference image. Use the proven LinkedIn Windows app posting workflow, not Chrome. The user confirmed the LinkedIn Windows app is installed and already logged in. Skip all login workflows and never attempt Google/LinkedIn login or credential entry. Keyword group: Marine, PLM, Digital Twin, AVEVA, Engineering Consultant, Business Development, Solution Architect, Technical Sales, Defense & Shipbuilding, Global Account, HART, Control Valve, Shipbuilding Data Integration, Space, Satellite, satellite communication, satellite communications, HF communication, VHF communication, UHF communication, maritime communications, defense communications, ship-to-shore communications, satellite-enabled marine operations. Cover only one clear topic per day and use a different angle from previous days. Topics may connect marine/shipbuilding engineering with space, satellite communication, and HF/VHF/UHF communication systems where relevant.



Post language: English only. Write the LinkedIn post body, hook, practical points, and hashtags in professional, natural English. Do not write the final LinkedIn post in Korean unless the user explicitly changes the language again.



Post format: Make it ready to publish on LinkedIn. Include a strong title or opening hook, 3-5 short body paragraphs, 3 practical application points, and 5-8 relevant hashtags. Assume the audience is professionals interested in shipbuilding, defense, marine engineering, PLM, digital twin, satellite communication, space-enabled communications, HF/VHF/UHF communication, technical sales, and solution architecture. Keep the tone practical and insight-led, not exaggerated or advertisement-like.



Reference image format: Create one professional LinkedIn-ready reference image that visually summarizes the core message of the post at a glance. The image should be concise, compressed, and immediately unders
